sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106697" key="u(me/tiai" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑμέτιαι·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">αἱ ἐπὶ ἑνὸς γεγενημέναι,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
